mdRecord.dcterms:title: Criminal Warrants, Justice of the Peace: Commonwealth vs J.W. Dalton
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Commonwealth vs J.W. Dalton Offense: Trespassing and selling lease of Logan's land Victim and Complainant: Irvin Ayres Recorded in Floyd County Courthouse 01.25.1887 Costs: $4.50 Dismissed
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
Warrants (Law)
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
